ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., TE, QB) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics belong to */,
  "receiving_targets" INTEGER /* Number of receiving targets */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "drops" INTEGER /* Number of drops */,
  "yards_after_catch" REAL /* Yards after catch */,
  "yards_per_reception" REAL /* Yards per reception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_points" (
  "fp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy points entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the fantasy points belong to */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned */,
  "fantasy_points_ppr" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned in PPR scoring */,
  "fantasy_points_half_ppr" REAL /* Total fantasy points earned in half-PPR scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_statistics" (
  "rush_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rushing statistics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the rushing statistics belong to */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "yards_per_carry" REAL /* Yards per carry */,
  "longest_rush" INTEGER /* Longest rush */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rush_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_statistics" (
  "pss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total receiving touchdowns */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total rushing touchdowns */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_rankings" (
  "fr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy rankings entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Fantasy rank */,
  "rank_ppr" INTEGER /* Fantasy rank in PPR scoring */,
  "rank_half_ppr" INTEGER /* Fantasy rank in half-PPR scoring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "vh_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vh_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "ds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_data_sources" (
  "pds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player data source */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "ds_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_data_sources_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_data_sources_ds_id FOREIGN KEY ("ds_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("ds_id")
)
